taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Software Testing, Quality Assurance, Compatibility Engineering, Hardware Validation, Software Validation
skill_match_scores: Software Testing:1.0, Quality Assurance:0.0, Compatibility Engineering:0.0, Hardware Validation:0.0, Software Validation:0.5
must_have_quals: BS degree in CS or equivalence, Previous experience in QA, software testing, or compatibility engineering, often requiring 3–5+ years in the industry, Strong understanding of hardware/software validation, test methodologies, and bug tracking tools, Ability to analyze failures and identify root causes in complex systems, Excellent written and verbal communication skills to report bugs and document test results
core_responsibilities: Validate application functionality across different operating systems, Design, develop, and execute test plans, test cases, and test protocols to identify defects, layout scaling issues, and crashes, Document software defects in bug tracking systems, perform initial debugging by analyzing logs, and collaborate with developers to find root causes, Install and configure simulated or real production environments to test software performance, Work with development teams, product managers, to review requirements and ensure high-quality releases
job_summary: Centific is a frontier AI data foundry that curates diverse, high-quality data to empower clients with scalable AI deployment. They are seeking a Software Testing Engineer to validate application functionality, design and execute test plans, and collaborate with development teams to ensure high-quality software releases.
